ab: Asaw, malalup ku murung za impis, karuwa u pavulas kaninku?
ch: W:Asaw，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Asaw, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: ’azi ku murung inku, nintaw ni Panay ini a.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Panay’s.

ab: nu kemazu mu, karuwa u pavulas kaninku za dika? kadika ku pareveliyas kaninu.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ai, niya!
en: Sure, take it.

ab: lrayuwan, lrayuwan kuwayu lra i Panay.
en: Thank you and thank Panay for me.

ab: maranger kemakuda?
en: May I help you?

ab: parevelaliyas ku kanini na zuwaya ’etiv na valray.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: ai, maranger u ziya eman?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: kiyavulas ku ziya kanini na teluwa ’etiv na valray.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: karuwa lra, ikalalup pareveliyas nu meredek kana teluwa wariyan.
ch: W:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: ’azi u ziya pareveliyas kananku aitrul.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: ku pareveliyasaw lra a daman.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: kemuda zi uniyan ku aitrul nu kemazu?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: nu pavulasanay kani Asaw kema ku.
en: Did you lend it to Asaw?

ab: ’azi ku malrazam, ku kiumalray ziya i intaw.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: kunu pavulasay ziya nanku aitrul.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Panay, ini na pakatras na kiping mu, tu ipavulas ni Asaw kaninu?
en: Panay, did Asaw lend you this coat?

ab: amelri, tu trinima’ ni inani kaninku.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: mararesan kaninu tu pakatras na kiping ni Asaw.
en: Asaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: a ’uze’uzem tu pakatras na kiping i intaw, ’azi maresan naniyam pinivalrayan.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Panay, kivulas u za paisu kani Asaw?
en: Panay, did you borrow money from Asaw?

ab: ai, parevelaliyas ku kanintaw harem kema ku mu, malalup ku murung za paisu.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: nu kemazu mu, parevelaliyas u nu aidan?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: parevelaliyas ku kanintaw nu ’emanan.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ai, puwalranga ku lra kaninu pakalrazam kani Asaw.
en: Okay, I will tell Asaw for you.
